items.name: Regular Carpet
items.description: You walk past a rug shop, where a clerk tries to sell you a magic carpet.  You tell him you don't want a magic carpet today. He then admits to you that he was lying, and this really is just a regular carpet. His whole life is a lie. Then he starts crying. You kind of have to buy it after that.  This is a regular carpet and it literally does nothing.

items.name: Gucci Glam Rock Shoulder Pads x Achille Lauro 1.0
items.description: Shoulder pads detailed with interlocking G that were worn by Achille Lauro on stage during the first night of Sanremo 2021 as the artist paid homage to the cult of Glam Rock with a performance of his song "Siamo soli." Item creation supervised by Rook Vanguard. This is a collectible item. Item created for 1.0 blocky avatar.
